---
title: "Publications"
---

For a full list, see [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=6eBNIrgAAAAJ&hl=en) or [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Phillip-Schmutz-2) or [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-7243-4815).


<sup>U</sup> Undergraduate student co-author\
<sup>G</sup> Graduate student co-author

### Peer-Reviewed Manuscripts

Williams, M.<sup>G</sup>, and **P.P. Schmutz**. 2026. Space--Time Mapping and Identification of Sea Turtle Nesting Clusters on Pensacola Beach and Gulf Islands National Seashore, Florida. *Southeastern Geographer*, *66* (2), 152-180. <https://doi.org/10.1353/sgo.0.a981639>

**Schmutz, P.P.**, & T. Briggs<sup>U</sup>, and S.R. Seals. 2025. Lagging behind: Impact of non-native gravel within a coastal dune system. *Aeolian Research*, *72*, 100957. <https://doi.org/10.1016/j.aeolia.2024.100957>

**Schmutz, P.P.** and A.P. Potter. 2024. Graffiti as Community Expression at Pensacola, Florida's Graffiti Bridge. *Southeastern Geographer*, *64* (4), 379-383. <https://doi.org/10.1353/sgo.2024.a942020>

Corkran, R.<sup>U</sup>, A.E. Potter, and **P.P. Schmutz**. 2023. The Impacts of Climate Change on Coastal Georgia Heritage Tourism Sites. *Southeastern Geographer*, *63* (1), 36-53. <https://doi.org/10.1353/sgo.2023.0004>

Nelson, S.A.<sup>U</sup>, and **P.P. Schmutz**. 2021. The Utility of Using a Near-Infrared (NIR) Camera to Measure Beach Surface Moisture. *Geomorphology*, *391*, 107895. <https://doi.org/10.1016/j.geomorph.2021.107895>

Harris, E.<sup>G</sup>, **P.P. Schmutz**, C. Jackson<sup>G</sup>, M. Anaya<sup>U</sup>, M. Johnson<sup>U</sup>, and G. Chapman<sup>U</sup>. 2020. Beach User Perception on the Economic and Ecological Importance of Sand Dunes at Pensacola Beach, Florida. *Southeastern Geographer*, *60* (4), 303-331. <https://doi.org/10.1353/sgo.2020.0026>

Gunn, A., **P.P. Schmutz**, M. Wanker, D.A. Edmonds, R.C. Ewing, and D.J. Jerolmack. 2020. Macroscopic flow disequilibrium over aeolian dune fields. *Geophysical Research Letters*, *47*, e2020GL088773. <https://doi.org/10.1029/2020GL088773>

Jackson, C.<sup>G</sup>, **P.P. Schmutz**, M. Harwell, and C. Littles. 2020. The ecosystem service of property protection and exposure to environmental stressors in the Gulf of Mexico. *Ocean and Coastal Management*, *104*, 105017. <https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ocecoaman.2019.105017>

**Schmutz, P.P.**, T. Briggs<sup>U</sup>, and P. Tereszkiewicz. 2019. The utility of an omni-directional photoelectronic sensor device to measure meso-scale variability in aeolian sediment transport activity. *Aeolian Research*, *36*, 61-67. <https://doi.org/10.1016/j.aeolia.2018.11.003>

**Schmutz, P.P.**, and S.L. Namikas. 2018. Measurement and modeling of the spatiotemporal dynamics of beach surface moisture content. *Aeolian Research*, *34*, 35-48. <https://doi.org/10.1016/j.aeolia.2018.08.001>

**Schmutz, P.P.**, and S.L. Namikas. 2013. Measurements and Modeling of Moisture Contents Above an Oscillating Water Table: Implications for Beach Surface Moisture Dynamics. *Earth Surface Processes and Landforms*, *38* (11), 1317--1325. <https://doi.org/10.1002/esp.3418>

Edwards, B.L., **P.P. Schmutz**, and S.L. Namikas. 2012. Comparison of surface moisture measurements to depth-integrated moisture measurements on a fine-grained beach. *Journal of Coastal Research*, *29* (6), 1284-1291. <https://doi.org/10.2112/JCOASTRES-D-12-00008.1>

**Schmutz, P.P.**, and S.L. Namikas. 2011. Utility of Delta-T Theta Probe for Obtaining Moisture Measurements from Beaches. *Journal of Coastal Research*, *27* (3), 478-485. <https://doi.org/10.2112/08-1130.1>

Hesp, P.A., **P.P. Schmutz**, M.L. Martinez, L. Driskill, R. Orgera, K. Renken, N.A.R. Revelo, and O.A.J. Orocio. 2010. The Effect on Coastal Vegetation of Trampling on a Parabolic Dune. *Aeolian Research*, *2* (2), 105-111. <https://doi.org/10.1016/j.aeolia.2010.03.001>

### Book Chapters

**Schmutz, P.P., A.E. Potter, and A.E. Modlin**. 2017. Aruba, Curacao, and Bonaire, *In: Allen, C (Ed.), Landscapes and Landforms of the Lesser Antilles*. Springer International Publishing. <https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-319-55787-8>

### Technical Reports (Non-Peer-Reviewed)

**Schmutz, P.P**. 2021. Environmental assessment of the Captain Sams Spit and applicability of the property to accommodate a South Carolina State Park. *Report \# 1.* South Carolina Department of Parks, Recreation, & Tourism.

### In Review

Cox, D.<sup>G</sup>, **P.P. Schmutz**, and S.R. Seals. In Review (2026). Modeling Sea Turtle Nesting Probability: Evaluating Loggerhead Nest Site Selection Using Presence--Pseudo-Absence Data. *Ecosphere*.

Agin, J.<sup>UG</sup>, **P.P. Schmutz**, P. Tereszkiewicz, and S.R. Seals. In Review (2026). Wrack as Dynamic Roughness: Controls on Wind Reduction and Sediment Deposition. *Aeolian Research*.
